Metadata.title: Lunatech — Creative technology studio
Metadata.description: Design, technology, and strategy as one digital experience: web, UI/UX, strategy, and performance for brands that stand out.

hero.headline: We build brands that stand out in the digital world
hero.sub: We combine design, technology, and strategy to turn your business into a strong digital experience.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: We don’t just ship products — we design digital experiences.

webExperience.title: Web experiences
webExperience.desc: Modern, fast, user-centred web platforms crafted for your brand.

uiux.title: UI / UX design
uiux.desc: Interfaces that guide, feel intuitive, and look refined.

strategy.title: Digital strategy
strategy.desc: Structure and direction aligned with your business goals.

performance.title: Performance and optimization
performance.desc: Speed, stability, and maximum real-world efficiency.

about.title: About Lunatech
about.p1: Lunatech is a creative team focused on building and evolving digital products.
about.p2: We work at the intersection of design and technology to deliver functional, aesthetic, and lasting solutions for brands.
about.p3: Our goal isn’t just to exist online — it’s to make a difference.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.p1: We look at every project through a strategic lens.
approach.p2: We balance aesthetics and performance to ship products that create real user value.
approach.p3: For us, design isn’t only how it looks — it’s how it works.

process.title: Process
process.discoverDetail: Align on goals, constraints, and audiences before we shape the work.
process.designDetail: Structure, visuals, and interaction — crafted for clarity and conversion.
process.buildDetail: Engineering with polish: performance, accessibility, QA, and resilient delivery.
process.launchDetail: Ship, measure, and iterate with a clear handover and support plan.
process.subtitle: Each phase is planned and transparent.

portfolio.title: Selected work
portfolio.subtitle: Every project — one problem, one approach, and a measurable outcome.
portfolio.demoNote: Sample reference (opens Aura in a new tab)

project1.title: Nebula Commerce
project1.summary: Headless storefront with cinematic product storytelling and scroll-driven narrative.
project1.body: Inspiration / placeholder: conversion-led UX, edge performance, modular design system, and motion-led product pages for seasonal campaigns.

project2.title: Pulse Fintech
project2.summary: Real-time portfolio experience with motion-led onboarding for trust.
project2.body: Inspiration / placeholder: biometric flows, accessible data visualization, and animated states that reinforce security and clarity.

project3.title: Aura Lifestyle
project3.summary: Wellness app with habit loops, glass UI, and retention-focused craft.
project3.body: Inspiration / placeholder: habit design, layered interface depth, and localized content strategy across multiple markets.

project4.title: Vertex AI Console
project4.summary: Operator tools for ML pipelines — dense UI, still readable in motion.
project4.body: Inspiration / placeholder: terminal-native patterns, role-based workspaces, and latency-aware live charts.

project5.title: Lunar Rebrand
project5.summary: Full identity for a space-tech hardware startup — including motion logo.
project5.body: Inspiration / placeholder: wordmark, animated identity, and component library aligned with manufacturing partners.

project6.title: Signal Launch Film
project6.summary: Product reveal and social cutdowns — shader-led hero and modular story beats.
project6.body: Inspiration / placeholder: real-time visuals, audio-reactive teasers, and paid-media-ready modular storytelling.

contact.title: Let’s build something powerful together
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your product or campaign. We typically reply within two business days.
contact.formNote: Opens your email app — we don’t store this on our servers.
contact.mailtoHint: Nothing is sent until you press Send in your email client.
